name: Google Vertex AI
description: Registers Google Vertex AI as a first-party OpenAI-compatible Gemini chat provider with project-scoped auth handoff.

env.description: Fallback Google Cloud OAuth access token used for Vertex AI inference when no access_token Plugin Setting is configured.
Alternate fallback Google Cloud OAuth access token used for Vertex AI inference.
Fallback Google Cloud project ID used when no project_id Plugin Setting is configured.
Fallback Vertex AI location used when no location Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Google Cloud OAuth access token
settings.description: Google Cloud OAuth access token authorized for Vertex AI inference. Falls back to GOOGLE_VERTEX_ACCESS_TOKEN or VERTEX_AI_ACCESS_TOKEN.

settings.label: Google Cloud project ID
settings.description: Google Cloud project ID containing the Vertex AI endpoint. Falls back to GOOGLE_VERTEX_PROJECT_ID.

settings.label: Vertex AI location
settings.description: Vertex AI location used in the OpenAI-compatible endpoint path. Falls back to GOOGLE_VERTEX_LOCATION, then global.

providers.name: Google Vertex AI
providers.description: Registers a conservative static Gemini chat model catalog for Vertex AI's OpenAI-compatible endpoint and serves it through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
